samples.title: Industrial Plant Cable Routing
samples.description: Motor-control, tray-fill, routing, one-line, and report workflow for a small process unit.

guidedWorkflow.title: Review Dashboard
guidedWorkflow.description: Confirm imported cable, raceway, and study coverage.

guidedWorkflow.title: Inspect Cable Schedule
guidedWorkflow.description: Review feeders and branch circuits assigned to tray routes.

guidedWorkflow.title: Check Tray Fill
guidedWorkflow.description: Review tray capacity and fill warning behavior.

guidedWorkflow.title: Review One-Line
guidedWorkflow.description: Open the one-line model that matches the sample feeders.

guidedWorkflow.title: Generate Report
guidedWorkflow.description: Open the unified report package for project deliverables.

samples.title: Data Center Power Distribution
samples.description: UPS, panel, feeder, load-flow, and lifecycle release workflow for a modular data hall.

guidedWorkflow.title: Review Dashboard
guidedWorkflow.description: Review imported panels, loads, and saved studies.

guidedWorkflow.title: Review Load List
guidedWorkflow.description: Inspect rack, UPS, and cooling loads.

guidedWorkflow.title: Open One-Line
guidedWorkflow.description: Review source, UPS, and distribution topology.

guidedWorkflow.title: Open Load Flow
guidedWorkflow.description: Review saved load-flow assumptions and results.

guidedWorkflow.title: Create Lifecycle Release
guidedWorkflow.description: Use the dashboard release panel to freeze the sample package.

samples.title: Substation Ground Grid
samples.description: Ground-grid study sample with equipment tags, grid assumptions, and report-ready saved results.

guidedWorkflow.title: Review Equipment
guidedWorkflow.description: Inspect switchgear and transformer records used for study context.

guidedWorkflow.title: Open Ground Grid Study
guidedWorkflow.description: Review the IEEE 80 screening inputs and saved result.

guidedWorkflow.title: Check Design Coach
guidedWorkflow.description: Review cross-study action ranking for the saved study.

guidedWorkflow.title: Open Project Report
guidedWorkflow.description: Confirm grounding study metadata is included in the report.

samples.title: Heat Trace Installation Package
samples.description: Saved heat-trace branches with construction metadata for line list, controller schedule, BOM, and warnings.

guidedWorkflow.title: Open Heat Trace
guidedWorkflow.description: Review saved branch cases and construction metadata.

guidedWorkflow.title: Review Package Tabs
guidedWorkflow.description: Inspect line list, controller schedule, BOM, warnings, and assumptions.

guidedWorkflow.title: Check Dashboard
guidedWorkflow.description: See saved heat-trace results in workflow and coach context.

guidedWorkflow.title: Open Report
guidedWorkflow.description: Verify heat-trace package details in the unified report.

samples.title: Duct Bank Thermal Review
samples.description: Underground duct-bank layout with conduits, cables, thermal-screening study data, and field outputs.

guidedWorkflow.title: Review Duct Bank
guidedWorkflow.description: Inspect ductbank and conduit records.

guidedWorkflow.title: Review Routed Cables
guidedWorkflow.description: Confirm underground feeders assigned to the ductbank.

guidedWorkflow.title: Open IEC 60287
guidedWorkflow.description: Review saved thermal screening data.

guidedWorkflow.title: Open Field View
guidedWorkflow.description: Review field-facing context for the underground route.

samples.title: Protection Coordination Study
samples.description: Source, transformer, switchboard, and feeder sample with short-circuit, arc-flash, and TCC study context.

guidedWorkflow.title: Review One-Line
guidedWorkflow.description: Inspect source, transformer, switchboard, and feeders.

guidedWorkflow.title: Open Short Circuit
guidedWorkflow.description: Review saved fault-duty assumptions.

guidedWorkflow.title: Open Arc Flash
guidedWorkflow.description: Review saved arc-flash screening inputs.

guidedWorkflow.title: Open TCC
guidedWorkflow.description: Review coordination workflow context.

guidedWorkflow.title: Review Design Coach
guidedWorkflow.description: Check prioritized study approvals and review actions.
